reasoning: Item 19 presents actual historical AUV (Gross Sales) data for 3,086 existing franchised Sonic Restaurants during FY2024. It is not a pro-forma or illustrative cohort. The restaurants in the Item 19 population operated under the same standard 5% royalty rate that current new franchisees are offered. Some restaurants may have been operating under legacy FA terms from predecessors (pre-2011), but the FDD states: 'The 2024 Sonic Restaurants offer essentially the same products and services, face the same kinds of competitive challenges, and receive the same level of support from us that we expect new franchisees will experience.' No different royalty rate, advertising fund rate, or technology fee was used in the Item 19 computation. Item 19 discloses top-line revenue (AUV) only — not EBITDA, cost build-up, or profitability — so the fee-rate comparability question is limited to the royalty base.
